app.name: Medha
common.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
onboarding.splash.setup_body: Downloading the on-device model so your prescriptions never leave this phone.
onboarding.splash.wifi_hint: Use Wi-Fi for the large download.
onboarding.value_intro.slide1_body: Scan a prescription and Medha reads the medicines for you — clearly and calmly.
onboarding.value_intro.slide2_body: Gujarati, Hindi, or English — tap Listen aloud and Medha speaks your schedule.
onboarding.value_intro.slide3_body: No cloud upload. Your prescription and health data stay on this device only.
onboarding.language.title: Choose your language
onboarding.language.subtitle: You can change this later in Settings.
onboarding.permission.privacy_note: Your data stays on this phone — nothing is uploaded.
onboarding.permission.summary_body: You can change these anytime in Settings. Denied permissions won't block you from using Medha.
onboarding.permission.camera.title: Camera access
onboarding.permission.camera.body: Needed to photograph your prescription so Medha can read it.
onboarding.permission.notifications.body: Needed to remind you when it's time to take your medicine.
onboarding.permission.photos.title: Photo library access
onboarding.permission.photos.body: Needed if you want to pick a prescription photo from your gallery.
onboarding.permission.microphone.title: Microphone access
onboarding.permission.microphone.body: Needed for voice commands and hands-free use in future updates.
onboarding.profile.title: Add profile
onboarding.profile.subtitle: Who will use Medha on this phone?
onboarding.profile.name_required: Please enter a name to continue.
onboarding.profile.disclaimer: Medha is AI, not a doctor. Always confirm medicines with your doctor.
home.title: Home
home.empty_doses_subtitle: Scan a prescription to set up your medicine schedule
home.today_readout: Today you have taken @taken of @total doses.
home.no_dose_today: No pending dose for this medicine today.
home.placeholder: Today's doses and active medicines will appear here.
refill.nudge_body: @count medicine(s) need a refill in the next 2 days.
refill.notification_body: @name may run out in @days day(s). Ask your doctor for a refill.
medicines.title: Medicines
medicines.empty_subtitle: Scan a prescription to get started
medicines.generic_empty: No generic alternative info found for this medicine.
medicines.generic_disclaimer: Medha is AI, not a doctor — never switch brands without your doctor or pharmacist.
medicines.compare_no_changes: No medicine changes compared to prescription from @label.
medicines.compare_disclaimer: Comparison is for your review only — confirm changes with your doctor.
reminders.title: Reminders
reminders.history_empty: No dose history for this month yet.
reminders.empty_subtitle: Scan a prescription to set up reminders
reminders.alert.title: Time to take your medicine
profile.title: Profile
profile.placeholder: Profile and settings will appear here.
profile.switch_subtitle: Choose who you are managing medicines for.
profile.menu_settings_sub: Language, text size, voice, and AI model
profile.menu_about_sub: Offline prescription helper — not a doctor
profile.disclaimer: Medha is AI, not a doctor — reads and reminds only.
profile.empty_subtitle: Add a patient profile to get started.
settings.title: Settings
settings.text_size_hint: Larger text helps elderly users read schedules easily.
settings.model_hint: The AI model stays on your phone. Use Wi-Fi for large downloads.
settings.model_ready_body: Offline AI is ready to read prescriptions.
settings.about_body: Offline, private prescription decoder and medication reminder for elderly users. Your data never leaves this phone.
settings.disclaimer: Medha is AI, not a doctor — always confirm medicines with your doctor.
scan.title: Scan Prescription
scan.guidance: Keep the prescription inside the frame
scan.error_capture: Could not capture the photo. Please try again.
scan.error_no_image: Please capture or choose a prescription photo first.
scan.error_permission: Camera or photo access is needed. Allow it in Settings.
scan.camera_unavailable: Camera is not available on this device.
scan.preview_hint: Check the photo is clear, then continue.
scan.disclaimer: Medha is AI, not a doctor — always confirm with your doctor.
scan.parsing.title: Reading your prescription…
scan.verify.title: Verify Medicines
scan.verify.thumbnail_hint: Tap fields marked “Please check” before saving.
scan.verify.name: Medicine name
scan.summary.title: Your Schedule
scan.summary.hero_body: Tap Listen aloud, then set reminders when you're ready.
rag.indexing_fallback: Using built-in medicine guide (search model not ready).
interactions.danger_body: These medicines may not be safe together. Please speak with your doctor before continuing.
interactions.doctor_call_hint: Please call your doctor from your phone dialer.
interactions.no_side_effects: No common side effects listed for this medicine in the on-device guide.
interactions.source_note: From on-device medicine guide · Medha is AI, not a doctor
interactions.no_interactions: No known interactions found in the on-device guide.
interactions.warning_body: @count possible interaction(s) found. Please review with your doctor.
interactions.no_food_rules: No food or timing rules listed for this medicine in the on-device guide.
adherence.title: History
adherence.day_empty: No dose records for this day.
adherence.empty_subtitle: Take or skip doses to build your adherence history.
adherence.empty_readout: No dose history for this month yet.
adherence.month_readout: @month: @percent percent adherence. @taken of @total doses taken. Streak @streak days.
doubt.title: Ask Medha
doubt.menu_subtitle: Speak your question — answered offline on phone
doubt.hero_body: Ask about your medicines, timing, or schedule in your own words. Everything stays on this phone.
doubt.offline_note: 100% offline · voice never leaves your device
doubt.pucho_subtitle: Speak your medicine question — answered offline on this phone
doubt.medicine_ask_hint: Tap the mic above to ask about this medicine. Medha will answer in your language.
doubt.error_empty_audio: Could not hear your question. Please try again.
doubt.error_empty_answer: Medha could not answer that. Please try again or ask your doctor.
doubt.error_mic_denied: Microphone access is needed to ask by voice. Allow it in Settings.
doubt.mock_answer_no_meds: I heard your question. Add your medicines first so I can answer about your schedule. Medha is AI, not a doctor — please confirm with your doctor.
doubt.mock_answer_with_meds: I heard your question about your medicines. Take them as prescribed, with food if noted, and call your doctor for any change. Medha is AI, not a doctor.
caregiver.title: Caregiver
caregiver.privacy_body: Caregiver details stay on this phone. Nothing is sent automatically. You choose what to share when you export or call.
caregiver.share_adherence_subtitle: When exporting PDF, include this month's dose history
caregiver.save_success_body: Caregiver contact saved on this phone.
caregiver.error_phone_invalid: Please enter a valid 10-digit phone number
caregiver.disclaimer: Medha is AI, not a doctor — does not contact caregivers automatically.
caregiver.call_hint: Could not open the phone dialer.
caregiver.remove_success_body: Caregiver contact removed from this phone.
doctor_export.title: Share with Doctor
doctor_export.menu_subtitle: PDF summary · you choose when to share
doctor_export.offline_note: 100% offline · PDF created on your phone
doctor_export.empty_subtitle: Add medicines and take a few doses to build a report
doctor_export.share_hint: Tap Export PDF to create a file, then choose how to share. Nothing leaves your phone until you tap Share.
doctor_export.disclaimer: Medha is AI, not a doctor — this report is for your doctor to review. Medha does not diagnose or change doses.
doctor_export.share_body: Medicine and adherence summary from Medha (offline).
doctor_export.share_body_caregiver: Medicine report for @name from Medha (offline). Please review.
doctor_export.caregiver_with_adherence: @name opted in — PDF includes this month's dose history.
doctor_export.caregiver_contact: @name is saved as caregiver — you choose when to share.
doctor_export.pdf_caregiver_with_adheren: Caregiver: @name · @phone · adherence summary included per patient preference.
doctor_export.empty_readout: No report data yet. Add medicines first.
doctor_export.preview_readout: Report for @name. @meds active medicines. @month adherence @percent percent.
doctor_export.pdf_subtitle: Offline summary · for doctor review only
doctor_export.empty_adherence: No dose history for this month.
doctor_export.pdf_stats_line: Taken @taken of @total · Missed @missed · Skipped @skipped · Streak @streak days
tts.timing_morning_night: Take it in the morning and at night.
tts.timing_morning_afternoon: Take it in the morning and in the afternoon.
tts.timing_afternoon_night: Take it in the afternoon and at night.
tts.timing_three_times: Take it in the morning, in the afternoon, and at night.
tts.timing_as_prescribed: Take it as your doctor advised.
tts.reminder_intro: It is time for your medicine.
